aids.title: Allocation Methods
aids.content:
Contiguous: Like parking in a row
Linked: Like treasure hunt (follow clues)
Indexed: Like book index (look up, then go)

aids.title: Inode Max File Size
aids.content:
With 4KB blocks, 4B pointers:
Direct: 12 × 4KB = 48KB
Single: 1K × 4KB = 4MB
Double: 1M × 4KB = 4GB
Triple: 1G × 4KB = 4TB
